title: CI: server selected unsupported protocol version 303
body:
### Issue Description

Cirrus-CI builds fail with an error uploading artifacts.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Open or push to a PR

### Describe the results you received

```
Uploading 1 artifacts for /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/repo.tbz
Uploading a quite hefty artifact '/var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/repo.tbz' of size 245 MB
Failed to upload artifacts: Put "https://cirrus-7b0c0a00f046cba7f1b46a7feba5a874-us-east-1.s3.amazonaws.com/artifacts/containers/podman/4615960838012928/repo/repo.tbz?X-Amz-Algorithm=AWS4-HMAC-SHA256&X-Amz-Date=20230216T200046Z&X-Amz-SignedHeaders=host%3Bx-amz-meta-created_by_task&X-Amz-Expires=600&X-Amz-Credential=AKIAWRET4G3IKXIQJNOI%2F20230216%2Fus-east-1%2Fs3%2Faws4_request&X-Amz-Signature=7bdf6e9a141f0900795ef9c6a6c94426d8cbea1c1fe4fffd46d1ea2eff259214": tls: server selected unsupported protocol version 303
```

### Describe the results you expected

Uploading artifacts succeededs

### podman info output

```yaml
N/A
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Cirrus-CI support has been contacted and is working on the problem.

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body: Cirrus is aware of the issue and (I hope) working on it: https://github.com/cirruslabs/cirrus-ci-docs/issues/1150
